document: Introduction to Internet of Things Assignment-Week 4 Solutions

questions.questionText: State whether the following statement is true or false. Statement: Instead of a PIR sensor, a camera can also be used in the agricultural field to detect intruders.
questions.explanation: Instead of a PIR sensor, a camera can also be used in the agricultural field to detect intruders.  See lecture 16 @ 13:21

questions.questionText: An ultrasonic sensor senses the _______ at which the object is located.
questions.explanation: An ultrasonic sensor senses the distance at which the object is located.  See lecture 16 @ 13:21
WMSNs can be used for a. Security surveillance b. Wild-habitat monitoring c. Environmental monitoring. [, 3582, 3583, 3584] See lecture 16 @ 22:17

questions.questionText: State whether the following statement is true or false. Statement: Objective of coverage in WSN is to use minimum number of sensors and maximize network lifetime.
questions.explanation: The objective of coverage in WSN is to use minimum number of sensors and maximize the network lifetime.  See lecture 17 @ 08:47

questions.questionText: What is the full form of AUV in the context of mobile wireless sensor networks?
questions.explanation: The full form of AUV is Autonomous Underwater Vehicle.  See lecture 18 @ 07:56

questions.questionText: State whether the following statement is true or false. In the localized coverage algorithm, special types of distributed algorithms are used where only one subset of nodes participates in sensing, communication, and computation.
questions.explanation: In the localized coverage algorithm, special types of distributed algorithms are used where only one subset of nodes participates in sensing, communication, and computation.  See lecture 17 @ 10:37

questions.questionText: Which of the following is/are advantage/advantages of Stationary Wireless Sensor Networks?
questions.explanation: The advantages of Stationary Wireless Sensor Networks are a. Easy deployment b. Easy topology maintenance c. Node can be placed in an optimized distance. See lecture 18 @ 01:12

questions.questionText: State true or false. In Human-centric Sensing, humanbeings can act as Sensor Operators?
questions.explanation: In Human-centric Sensing, human beings can act as Sensor Operators.  See lecture 18 @ 12:36

questions.questionText: Which of the following is not a property of MANET-infrastructure less network of mobile devices connected wirelessly?
questions.explanation: MANET-infrastructure less network of mobile devices connected wirelessly which follow self-CHOP properties. Also, HOP is a subset of CHOP properties. Hence, both Self-CHOP and Self-HOP are properties of MANET-infrastructure less network of mobile devices connected wirelessly.  See lecture 18 @ 04:28

questions.questionText: State whether the following statement is true or false. Statement: UAV networks provide a solution for deployments where there is a need for frequent change configurations.
questions.explanation: UAV networks provide a solution for deployments where there is a need for frequent change configurations.  See lecture 19 @ 03:23

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a feature of mesh topology in UAV system?
questions.explanation: Features of mesh topology in UAV system are - Flexible, Reliable.  See lecture 19 @ 12:53

questions.questionText: Which of the following is not a property of a FANET?
questions.explanation: Inter-plane and Intra-plane communication are properties of FANET.  See lecture 19 @ 16:51

questions.questionText: State true or false. M2M networks are characterized by a few number of sensor nodes deployed over a large area.
questions.explanation: M2M networks are characterized by a large number of sensor nodes.  See lecture 20 @ 10:17

questions.questionText: What is the full form of M2SP in the context of Machine-to-Machine Communication?
questions.explanation: M2SP stands for M2M Service Platform.  See lecture 20 @ 16:31

questions.questionText: The _______ provides integrated services based on device collected data-sets.
questions.explanation: The M2M Application Platform provides integrated services based on device collected data-sets.  See lecture 20 @ 18:00
